note: Soft tier classification for detected model IDs. Live detection is truth; this table only pre-tags KNOWN ids so cad-config can auto-place them. Staleness is soft: an unmatched id gets tier=null and the user places it manually - it never errors. Rules are ordered most-specific-first; match is case-insensitive substring; first match wins. Tiers: flagship (deep reasoning) | balanced (cost/quality mid) | cheap (fast/frequent). high_effort = the id meaningfully honors a high reasoning/thinking level. Update as families ship.
